chunks.title: Oracle Against Shepherds
chunks.reason: Yahweh pronounces judgment on the failed shepherds of Israel for neglecting the flock.

chunks.title: God's Promise to Shepherd
chunks.reason: Yahweh declares His personal intervention to gather, restore, and judge the flock.

chunks.title: Judgment Within the Flock
chunks.reason: Yahweh addresses the internal conflict between the fat and lean sheep.

chunks.title: Covenant of Peace and Restoration
chunks.reason: The chapter concludes with the promise of a Davidic shepherd, peace, and eternal security.
